Casey Morgan
Columbus, OH

BUSINESS OPERATIONS COORDINATOR
Harborline Distribution | 2023-2026

- Coordinated improvement projects across sales, warehouse operations, finance,
  and customer service for a regional commercial equipment distributor.
- Replaced email-based service requests with a documented intake and assignment
  process, giving managers clearer ownership and turnaround reporting.
- Built Excel trackers and pivot-table reports for order delays, service volume,
  inventory exceptions, and customer response times.
- Reviewed customer surveys and service notes alongside monthly operating
  metrics to identify recurring delivery and communication problems.
- Prepared concise weekly summaries of project status, unresolved dependencies,
  and decisions needed from department leaders.
- Facilitated planning meetings, documented action items, and followed up with
  owners when deadlines or handoffs were at risk.
- Helped coordinate the rollout of a new inventory system by maintaining the
  project checklist, scheduling training, and collecting employee feedback.
- Created process guides in Confluence and managed improvement tasks in Jira.
- Supported managers with spreadsheet-based staffing scenarios and quarterly
  capacity planning.

PROJECT COORDINATOR
Stonebridge Consulting Group | 2021-2023

- Maintained schedules, risk logs, meeting notes, and client deliverables for
  process-improvement engagements in retail and light manufacturing.
- Interviewed client employees, grouped recurring workflow problems, and helped
  consultants turn findings into recommendations.
- Produced basic Tableau visualizations from cleaned spreadsheet exports but did
  not write database queries or administer analytics systems.
- Coordinated client review sessions and revised documentation when requirements
  or timelines changed.
- Balanced several small engagements independently and escalated scope or
  schedule conflicts to the engagement manager.

EDUCATION

Bachelor of Science in Business Administration
